day1_opening_2.name: Me
day1_opening_2.text: *Cherry blossoms flutter in the air. A warm spring breeze seeps through my new uniform.*

day1_opening_3.name: Me
day1_opening_3.text: *The uniform is still stiff. It faintly smells of starch. Even though I ironed it yesterday, the creases have a mind of their own. Already off to a bad start with this uniform.*

day1_opening_4.name: Me
day1_opening_4.text: *Starting today, I'm a student at this school.*

day1_opening_5.name: Me
day1_opening_5.text: *Transfer student. First time. Couldn't be helped because of my parents' work -- but honestly, I'm a bit anxious. The words "transfer student" carry both "center of attention" and "all alone" at the same time. Neither sounds great.*

day1_opening_6.name: Me
day1_opening_6.text: *I can keep in touch with my old school friends through social media. I texted Minsu this morning -- 'First day today lol' -- but he still hasn't read it. Probably still sleeping, that guy.*

day1_opening_7.name: Me
day1_opening_7.text: *A cherry blossom petal brushes the tip of my nose. I almost sneezed. If this were a drama, this is where a pretty girl would bump into me and make her entrance.*

day1_gate_1.name: Me
day1_gate_1.text: *I stood in front of an unfamiliar school gate.*

day1_gate_2.name: Me
day1_gate_2.text: *It's a pretty big school. The buildings are clean and the sports field is spacious. Looks like better facilities than my old school. Bigger budget? Or maybe fewer students.*

day1_gate_3.name: Me
day1_gate_3.text: *Students pass through the gate in small groups. A normal morning scene of laughter and chatter. I'm the only one whose uniform is brand-new stiff. Like a walking billboard -- 'Hey, I'm the new kid.'*

day1_gate_4.name: Me
day1_gate_4.text: *...Nobody pays any attention to me. Good. Being ignored is better than being noticed. At least there's no chance of screwing up.*

day1_gate_5.name: Me
day1_gate_5.text: *One deep breath. Let's go in. Standing here won't make the school come to me.*

day1_hallway_1.name: Me
day1_hallway_1.text: *Walking down the hallway. No idea where I'm supposed to go.*

day1_hallway_2.name: Me
day1_hallway_2.text: *Even after checking the directory, the classroom locations are confusing. First-year building... Second-year building... Main building? Annex?*

day1_hallway_3.name: Me
day1_hallway_3.text: *...But my feet are naturally heading toward the right corridor.*

day1_hallway_4.name: Me
day1_hallway_4.text: *...Why am I going this way? I've never been in this building before. ...Oh, maybe there was an arrow on the directory? Yeah, probably.*

day1_sea_meet_1.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_meet_1.text: Are you the transfer student? I heard someone was coming today.

day1_sea_meet_2.name: Me
day1_sea_meet_2.text: *I turned around to see a neatly put-together girl standing there.*

day1_sea_meet_3.name: Me
day1_sea_meet_3.text: *Brown twin tails, uniform worn crisply. She looks confident.*

day1_sea_meet_5.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_meet_5.text: I'm Han Sea. Class representative. You're {name}, right?

day1_sea_meet_6.name: Me
day1_sea_meet_6.text: Uh, yeah. That's me... but how do you know my name?

day1_sea_meet_7.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_meet_7.text: Our homeroom teacher told me. She let me know a transfer student was coming.

day1_sea_meet_9.name: Me
day1_sea_meet_9.text: *She's the class rep, so of course she'd be told in advance.*

day1_sea_meet_10.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_meet_10.text: Looking for the classroom? Follow me, I'll show you around.

day1_sea_meet_11.name: Me
day1_sea_meet_11.text: *Sea walks ahead of me. She points things out as we go down the hallway.*

day1_sea_meet_12.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_meet_12.text: This is the science lab, and the music room is at the end there. Second floor is for third-years, so you won't need to go up there.

day1_sea_meet_13.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_meet_13.text: Oh, the school store is at the end of the first floor. The line gets long at lunchtime, so good to know in advance.

day1_sea_meet_14.name: Me
day1_sea_meet_14.text: Wow, that's really nice of you. Is this a class rep thing?

day1_sea_meet_15.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_meet_15.text: Partly because I'm class rep, I guess...

day1_sea_meet_17.name: Han Sea
day1_sea_meet_17.text: I just want to help when I see a new kid wandering around lost.

day1_choco_1.name: Me
day1_choco_1.text: *On the way to the classroom, Sea pulls something out of her bag.*

day1_choco_2.name: Han Sea
day1_choco_2.text: Oh right, this. Want a chocolate milk? It was buy-one-get-one at the store and I can't drink both.

day1_choco_3.name: Me
day1_choco_3.text: *She holds out a small chocolate milk carton.*

day1_choco_4.name: Me
day1_choco_4.text: *If it's free, there's no reason to refuse.*

day1_choco_5.name: Me
day1_choco_5.text: Oh? Thanks, but... what's the occasion?

day1_choco_6.name: Han Sea
day1_choco_6.text: You were too nervous to eat breakfast, right? An empty stomach makes the jitters worse. At least drink this.

choices: ...How did you know I like this?
I'm actually more of a strawberry milk person.

day1_choco_accept_1.name: Me
day1_choco_accept_1.text: *I poke in the straw and take a sip. Sweet. Tasty.*

day1_choco_accept_3.name: Han Sea
day1_choco_accept_3.text: Right? Chocolate is a safe choice.

day1_choco_accept_4.name: Me
day1_choco_accept_4.text: *Well, most people do like it. They probably had strawberry too if it was buy-one-get-one -- but she picked chocolate.*

day1_choco_question_1.name: Me
day1_choco_question_1.text: ...Wait, how did you know I like chocolate milk?

day1_choco_question_2.name: Me
day1_choco_question_2.text: *Sea's expression stiffens ever so slightly. One blink. Then right back to a smile.*

day1_choco_question_3.name: Han Sea
day1_choco_question_3.text: ...I told you, it was buy-one-get-one? They had strawberry too, but I thought chocolate was a safer bet.

day1_choco_question_4.name: Me
day1_choco_question_4.text: No, you're right. I do like it. Thanks.

day1_choco_question_6.name: Me
day1_choco_question_6.text: *Sea smiles. Well, if it was buy-one-get-one, of course she'd pick the safe option.*

day1_choco_joke_2.name: Me
day1_choco_joke_2.text: *Sea hesitates. Just for an instant. This time I definitely saw it.*

day1_choco_joke_3.name: Han Sea
day1_choco_joke_3.text: Oh really? ...Next time it's strawberry for sure. I'll remember that.

day1_classroom_1.name: Me
day1_classroom_1.text: *With Sea's guidance, I arrived at the classroom.*

day1_classroom_2.name: Me
day1_classroom_2.text: *I opened the door and stepped in. Every pair of eyes in the room turned to me at once.*

day1_classroom_3.name: Me
day1_classroom_3.text: *...Nervous. I can hear murmuring. 'That's the transfer student.' 'Where's he from?' That sort of thing.*

day1_classroom_4.name: Me
day1_classroom_4.text: *I set my bag down and took a seat. Window seat. Cherry blossoms visible outside. Not bad.*

day1_classroom_5.name: Me
day1_classroom_5.text: *After some light chatting, the classroom door opens and the homeroom teacher walks in.*

day1_eunsu_1.name: Me
day1_eunsu_1.text: *A young female teacher with glasses. She has a gentle appearance.*

day1_eunsu_2.name: Eunsu
day1_eunsu_2.text: Alright, everyone. I'd like to introduce a new transfer student today.

day1_eunsu_4.name: Eunsu
day1_eunsu_4.text: {name}, would you like to come up and introduce yourself?

day1_eunsu_5.name: Me
day1_eunsu_5.text: *Standing in front of the blackboard makes me even more nervous. Thirty pairs of eyes are watching me.*

day1_eunsu_6.name: Eunsu
day1_eunsu_6.text: Welcome. We're glad to have you.

day1_eunsu_7.name: Me
day1_eunsu_7.text: *The teacher smiles. Warmly. I've never met her before, but somehow I feel at ease.*

day1_eunsu_9.name: Me
day1_eunsu_9.text: Hello. I'm {name}. I transferred from XX High School. Nice to meet you all.

day1_eunsu_10.name: Eunsu
day1_eunsu_10.text: Any hobbies or things you like?

day1_eunsu_11.name: Me
day1_eunsu_11.text: Um... I like gaming and listening to music.

day1_eunsu_12.name: Me
day1_eunsu_12.text: *The students laugh. Probably because it's such a generic answer.*

day1_eunsu_13.name: Eunsu
day1_eunsu_13.text: Great. Everyone, please make {name} feel welcome. Your seat is over there by the window in the back row.

day1_eunsu_14.name: Me
day1_eunsu_14.text: *I head back to my seat. Sea gives me a thumbs up. Ms. Eunsu nods and smiles.*

day1_seolhwa_1.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_1.text: *Before the second class starts. I glanced behind me from my seat.*

day1_seolhwa_3.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_3.text: *Light-colored, messy hair. Looks like she didn't brush it properly this morning. She's staring out the window.*

day1_seolhwa_4.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_4.text: *Notably quiet. Not talking to any of the other students. Looks a bit drowsy. Well, it is morning.*

day1_seolhwa_5.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_5.text: *There's also a boy with glasses sitting in the far corner of the back row. He's also sitting alone, reading a manga. The back row seems to be the quiet zone.*

choices: Hi, I'm {name}. Looks like I'm sitting in front of you.

day1_seolhwa_greet_2.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_2.text: Hi, I'm {name}. Nice to meet you.

day1_seolhwa_greet_3.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_3.text: *Seolhwa looked at me. Our eyes met.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_4.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_4.text: *...She gives an awkward smile. Maybe she's not used to being greeted. Her ears turned red.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_5.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_5.text: *After a short silence, in a very small voice:*

day1_seolhwa_greet_7.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_7.text: *One word. That was it. She immediately looked away toward the window. -- Is she shy? This type usually starts talking a lot later on.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_8.name: Boy student
day1_seolhwa_greet_8.text: Hey, transfer kid. Who were you talking to back there?

day1_seolhwa_greet_9.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_9.text: I was saying hi to the person sitting behind me, but I didn't really get a response.

day1_seolhwa_greet_10.name: Boy student
day1_seolhwa_greet_10.text: Oh, her? She never talks to anyone. Been like that since first year.

day1_seolhwa_greet_11.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_11.text: *I looked back. Seolhwa is gazing out the window. The boy with glasses in the corner hasn't looked up from his manga either. The back row is that kind of place, I guess.*

day1_seolhwa_greet_12.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_12.text: I see. The quiet type, huh.

day1_seolhwa_greet_13.name: Boy student
day1_seolhwa_greet_13.text: She answers sometimes if you talk to her, but she's never started a conversation. I don't even know her name.

day1_seolhwa_greet_14.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_greet_14.text: *I see. Well, every class has one or two of those. My old school had someone like that too.*

day1_seolhwa_skip.name: Me
day1_seolhwa_skip.text: *Let's focus on class. No time to worry about the back row.*

day1_dejavu2_1.name: Me
day1_dejavu2_1.text: *During class, I dropped my pencil and looked under the desk.*

day1_dejavu2_2.name: Me
day1_dejavu2_2.text: *There are scratch marks on the underside of the desk. Something written with a pencil or pen. Old and faded.*

day1_dejavu2_3.name: Me
day1_dejavu2_3.text: *...The handwriting looks familiar. It looks like mine? No, that can't be. It's my first day as a transfer student -- there's no way my handwriting would be under this desk.*

day1_dejavu2_4.name: Me
day1_dejavu2_4.text: *...Too faded to read. Don't think about it.*

day1_break_1.name: Me
day1_break_1.text: *Break time. A few boys come over.*

day1_break_2.name: Classmate A
day1_break_2.text: Hey, transfer kid. Where'd you come from?

day1_break_5.name: Me
day1_break_5.text: *The conversation flows naturally. Favorite games, YouTubers.*

day1_break_6.name: Classmate B
day1_break_6.text: Dude, Sea's really looking after you.

day1_break_8.name: Classmate B
day1_break_8.text: She's never brought a lunchbox before though?

day1_pe_1.name: Me
day1_pe_1.text: *P.E. class. Soccer. The ball went high. I trapped it with my left foot.*

day1_pe_2.name: Me
day1_pe_2.text: *...I'm better than I expected. Was I always this good at soccer at my old school?*

day1_pe_4.name: Me
day1_pe_4.text: *Yuna is standing at the corner of the sports field, holding a camera.*
